zh.Manchester, Lanc, Engl: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Ledet於大約1201年出生在英國時，她的父親Wischard Ledet38歲，母親Margery Foliot34歲。她於大約1220年與Thomas Grelley I在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1271年享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Ledet于大约1201年出生在英国时，她的父亲Wischard Ledet38岁，母亲Margery Foliot34岁。她于大约1220年与Thomas Grelley I在英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1271年享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ledet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Emile, Leonce, Angelle, Antoine, Aurelie, Camille, Etienne, Ferrel, Gillis, Gisele.

French: variant of Ledé, from le dé, meaning either ‘the thimble’ or ‘the die’, hence used as a metonymic occupational name for a stitcher or tailor, or as a nickname for a gambler. Compare Leday 1 and Ledee 2.

History: Antoine Livaudais Ledet from La Rochelle in Charente-Maritime, France, married first Marguerite Willig in Edgard, LA, in 1788, and second Victoire-Françoise Quimine in Plattenville, LA, in 1797.

variants.name: Ledee
meanings: French (Ledée and Lédée): variant of Ledé (see Ledet ). This surname is also found in the West Indies, including Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Leday
meanings: Americanized form of French   Ledet  . This surname is found mainly in LA and TX, and is borne mainly by African Americans. Compare   Lada   5.
In some cases possibly also French: variant, with fused masculine definite article le, of Day , a habitatonal name from Day in the Ardennes.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Ledet was born about 1201, in England, her father, Wischard Ledet, was 38 and her mother, Margery Foliot, was 34. She married Thomas Grelley I about 1220, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1271, at the age of 71.

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Ledet(이)가 대략 1201년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wischard Ledet(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Foliot(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 Thomas Grelley I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.
